properties.description: Master pipeline for end-to-end orchestration of PT Frozen Foods data platform from Bronze to Gold marts

activities.name: exec_bronze_ingestion
activities.description: Execute Bronze ingestion pipelines for all source systems (CRM, ERP, Reference, Weather, Web)

activities.name: exec_silver_standardization
activities.description: Silver layer standardization pipeline for all source systems

activities.name: exec_silver_integration
activities.description: Silver integration pipeline combining datasets such as orders and customers

activities.name: exec_gold_dimensions
activities.description: Gold layer dimension pipelines (calendar, customer, product, supplier, sales channel, weather)

activities.name: exec_gold_fact
activities.description: Gold fact pipeline responsible for building fact_sales

activities.name: exec_gold_marts
activities.description: Gold marts pipeline for analytical tables and business consumption
